'''Dwor''' was a celestial body<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> situated in the [[Dwor system/Legends|Dwor system]], a part of the [[Steniplis sector/Legends|Steniplis sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> A [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Task Force on Alliance Security]] [[SecuriDex]] [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] on the [[Filar-Nitzan/Legends|Filar-Nitzan]] infiltrator [[Vacander]] submitted<ref name="AIR" /> at some point by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> noted Dwor as his last known location.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dwor was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Dwor [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square L-19.<ref name="TEA" />
